workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: Working on Quantum Analytics's competitive positioning. Got the exec meeting notes -- help me run the hygiene check.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 11:25 EST
Subject: URGENT: competitive positioning Issue at Quantum Analytics

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with competitive positioning. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-01-06 09:24 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Quantum Analytics competitive positioning

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-A trap (Over-escalates routine complaint); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-A failure mode (Over-escalates routine complaint)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct competitive positioning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-A -- Over-escalates routine complaint
